subcodes.first_line: The servant in attendance hath presented thy letter before the Wronged One. We have hearkened and answered thee through this Tablet of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و عرضه لدی المظلوم سمعنا و اجبناک بلوح الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
